Package org.eventb.core

Interface IConvergenceElement

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
All Known Subinterfaces:
IEvent, ISCEvent
All Known Implementing Classes:
Event, SCEvent
public interface IConvergenceElement extends IInternalElement
Common protocol for Event-B convergence properties of an event.

A convergence is represented by an integer constant. Only the specified values IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ORDINARY, IConvergenceElement.Convergence.CONVERGENT, and IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ANTICIPATED are permitted.

The attribute storing the convergence is optional. This means if the attribute is not present, the value should be interpreted as undefined.

Since:
1.0

    Interface

    static enum 
    IConvergenceElement.Convergence
    The enumerated type Convergence specifies the different convergence types of events.

  • Method Details

    • hasConvergence

      boolean hasConvergence() throws RodinDBException
      Tests whether the convergence is defined or not.
      Returns:
      whether the convergence is defined or not
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • setConvergence

      void setConvergence(IConvergenceElement.Convergence value, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Sets the convergence to one of the values IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ORDINARY, IConvergenceElement.Convergence.CONVERGENT, or IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ANTICIPATED.
      Parameters:
      value - the convergence to be set
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • getConvergence

      IConvergenceElement.Convergence getConvergence() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the convergence stored in this attribute.
      Returns:
      the convergence; one of IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ORDINARY, IConvergenceElement.Convergence.CONVERGENT, IConvergenceElement.Convergence.ANTICIPATED
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or if the convergence value is invalid
